name: Agentalent.ai
description: Managed marketplace for enterprises to discover, evaluate, hire, and deploy AI agents for defined business roles. Launched March 2026, provides agent authentication, qualification, and integration with enterprise teams.
notes: Built in collaboration with AWS and Anthropic. Enables enterprises to post AI agent roles, review qualified agents, and manage portfolios of AI workers alongside human teams. First-of-kind marketplace specifically designed for AI agent hiring and deployment.
